mapper.select: SELECT status FROM expense_record WHERE register_id = #{registerId} AND item_code = 'MEDICATION_FEE' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO expense_record ( register_id, patient_id, patient_name, category_name, item_name, item_code, quantity, unit_price, total_amount, status, remark, create_time ) VALUES ( #{registerId}, #{patientId}, #{patientName}, '药品费', '药品费', 'MEDICATION_FEE', 1, #{totalAmount}, #{totalAmount}, #{initialStatus}, #{remark}, #{createTime} ) ON CONFLICT (register_id) WHERE item_code = 'MEDICATION_FEE' DO NOTHING
